q5: Despite any contrary sentence, all recovery for Section 13 or Section 14 claims is limited to the amount stated in Section 16.

Section 1 contains a broken/redundant phrase: "Vendor will provide hosted records normalization, normalization, mapping, and workflow services…" (repetition of "normalization" disrupts sentence coherence).
Vendor will provide hosted records normalization, normalization, mapping, and workflow services described in one or more signed order forms or statements of work (each, an "Order Form").
